_: Golden canary set for the cross-game eval (tools/eval-all.mjs). It runs the engine game-template against SDK HEAD (the DIRECT engine-SDK regression test) PLUS each golden game's own gate (per-genre coverage). Per game: 'sdk':'head' vendors engine/sdk/studio.js (only valid for engine-lineage games); 'sdk':'own' runs the game with its OWN shipped SDK (other lineages — a health check). 'eval':'own' uses the repo's eval.mjs; 'eval':'none' means no harness yet (skipped, not failed).

games.note: no eval.mjs in repo and game.js doesn't set the __ready contract; the platformer genre is covered by the engine game-template until a deepfin eval is added
